What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
A
Alice M.

Freds General Plumbing replaced my old water heater quickly and efficiently. The technician was professional and explained everything clearly. I highly recommend them!

B
Bob K.

I had a stubborn clogged drain that I couldn't clear myself. Freds General Plumbing came out and cleared it in no time. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent.

C
Carol S.

I suspected I had a hidden leak, and Freds General Plumbing was able to find it and repair it quickly. They saved me a lot of money and potential damage. Thank you!

D
David L.

My sewer line was backed up, and Freds General Plumbing was able to repair it without digging up my entire yard. They were professional, efficient, and reasonably priced. I highly recommend them!

Freds General Plumbing — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every plumbing company project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Freds General Plumbing Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific plumbing company needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Arlington & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Arlington, TX and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Dallas Fort Worth Plano Frisco McKinney Arlington Irving Grand Prairie
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our plumbing company services.

How often should I have my drains cleaned?

We recommend having your drains cleaned at least once a year, or more frequently if you experience recurring clogs.

What is hydro jetting?

Hydro jetting uses high-pressure water to blast away stubborn clogs and buildup from the inside of your pipes.

Is drain cleaner safe for my pipes?

Chemical drain cleaners can damage your pipes and are often ineffective. We recommend professional drain cleaning services for safe and effective results.

Built on Arlington Values

Call Freds General Plumbing now for fast, reliable service in Arlington and beyond.

Let's Begin →
